svg.title: AstrIA — Robot astronaute vert et violet
svg.desc: Mascotte robot astronaute pour l'interface AstrIA en vert et violet

circle.style: animation: twinkle 2.1s ease-in-out infinite;;fill:rgb(168, 85, 247);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.260803;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation: twinkle 3s ease-in-out 0.5s infinite; opacity:0.5;fill:rgb(74, 222, 128);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.736873;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

animation: twinkle 1.9s ease-in-out 1s infinite; opacity:0.5;fill:rgb(74, 222, 128);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.488947;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

ellipse.style: animation: float 3.2s ease-in-out infinite; transform-origin: 340px 475px;;fill:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:0.08;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
